title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin discusses the US government ordering Anthropic to withdraw Claude Fable 5 from availability due to export-control concerns and a claimed jailbreak vulnerability. The video covers the regulatory action, why the model was pulled overnight, and its performance benchmarks relative to Claude Opus 4.8.
writeup: Cole Medin covers the US government's order for Anthropic to withdraw Claude Fable 5 from availability, citing export-control concerns and a claimed jailbreak vulnerability. The video explains the regulatory action behind the overnight removal and reviews the model's performance benchmarks relative to Claude Opus 4.8. The takeaway: a frontier model can be pulled by regulators on safety and export grounds even after release, with benchmark standing measured against an existing Claude model.
